ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility of the item on the shelf */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the item (e.g., SKU) */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., Dairy, Bakery) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the item */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_age" REAL /* Age of the outlet */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Type of location for the outlet */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the outlet */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the outlet */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the item was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold per unit */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being promoted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered during the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., Buy One Get One, Flat Discount) */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  "target_customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment targeted by the promotion (e.g., Students, Seniors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which to reorder the item */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last restocked */,
  "average_daily_sales" REAL /* Average daily sales of the item */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to restock the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the purchase */,
  "loyalty_points_earned" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned from the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being rated */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response to the feedback (e.g., Pending, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the employee works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the item */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating for the item based on customer feedback */,
  "sales_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of sales for the item */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Score based on customer satisfaction surveys */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id")
)
